test_patch:
diff --git a/internal/server/evaluation/legacy_evaluator_test.go b/internal/server/evaluation/legacy_evaluator_test.go
index e0fec51f..308665e8 100644
--- a/internal/server/evaluation/legacy_evaluator_test.go
+++ b/internal/server/evaluation/legacy_evaluator_test.go
@@ -198,6 +198,77 @@ func Test_matchesString(t *testing.T) {
 			value:     "nope",
 			wantMatch: true,
 		},
+		// contains-strings (positive substring operator)
+		{
+			name: "blocker_positive_operator_contains_strings_match",
+			constraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{
+				Property: "foo",
+				Operator: "contains-strings",
+				Value:    "bar",
+			},
+			value:     "foobarbaz",
+			wantMatch: true,
+		},
+		{
+			name: "blocker_positive_operator_contains_strings_no_match",
+			constraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{
+				Property: "foo",
+				Operator: "contains-strings",
+				Value:    "bar",
+			},
+			value: "foobaz",
+		},
+		// not-contains-strings (negative substring operator)
+		{
+			name: "blocker_negative_operator_not_contains_strings_match",
+			constraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{
+				Property: "foo",
+				Operator: "not-contains-strings",
+				Value:    "bar",
+			},
+			value:     "foobaz",
+			wantMatch: true,
+		},
+		{
+			name: "blocker_negative_operator_not_contains_strings_no_match",
+			constraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{
+				Property: "foo",
+				Operator: "not-contains-strings",
+				Value:    "bar",
+			},
+			value: "foobarbaz",
+		},
+		// case-insensitive substring (blocker: conflicting_case_sensitivity_requirement)
+		{
+			name: "blocker_case_insensitive_contains_strings_match",
+			constraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{
+				Property: "foo",
+				Operator: "contains-strings",
+				Value:    "Bar",
+			},
+			value:     "foobar",
+			wantMatch: true,
+		},
+		// empty evaluated value (blocker: ambiguous_entity_id_contains_behavior)
+		{
+			name: "blocker_empty_value_contains_strings_no_match",
+			constraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{
+				Property: "foo",
+				Operator: "contains-strings",
+				Value:    "bar",
+			},
+			value: "",
+		},
+		{
+			name: "blocker_empty_value_not_contains_strings_match",
+			constraint: storage.EvaluationConstraint{
+				Property: "foo",
+				Operator: "not-contains-strings",
+				Value:    "bar",
+			},
+			value:     "",
+			wantMatch: true,
+		},
 	}
 	for _, tt := range tests {
 		var (
